_comment: CocoShaMem SEED — the corporate shared memory the pipeline reads. Each item has an ACCESS 'category' (RBAC, enforced by the bouncer) and CONTENT 'tags' (relevance matching only, never access). Runtime memory-writes go to the git-ignored cocoshamem.json (seeded from this file on first use); THIS seed is committed demo data only. NOTE: mem-financials carries the 'london' tag on purpose, so a 'london' query is RELEVANT to it yet still DENIED to a driver — proving relevance never bypasses access.

items.text: The team is based in London (not Tokyo).
Good lunch near the London office: the deli on Carter Lane does great sandwiches.
Visitor parking for the London office is on Friar Street.
Q3 revenue for the London office was 4.2M at 18% margin.
The supplier contract has a late-delivery penalty clause.
The London office moved to Friar Street.
